name: Jumpossess
author: Poki
description: Jumpossess is a platform game where reaching the goal is all about teamwork… with a twist! You start as a cute character who’s immune to dangerous black spikes, but there are obstacles that require different abilities—like jumping higher or moving boxes. That’s where your unique power comes in: possess other characters to borrow their skills and solve puzzles to progress. Strategize, switch bodies, and conquer each level. Can you find the perfect possession to reach the end? How to play Jumpossess? Move: A, D or left and right arrow keys Jump: W or up arrow key Down: D or down arrow key Reset: R Back: Esc Who created Jumpossess? Jumpossess is created by Robert Alvarez. They have other thinking games on Poki : Two Button Bounce , Return Portal , Blockins , One Button Bounce , Ledge Throw , Platform Countdown , Hop Warp , Plactions , Jumping Clones , Big Tall Small , Teleport Jumper , Block Toggle , Isotiles , Chessformer , Sides of Gravity , Resizer , Grapple Grip and Time Clones ! How can I play Jumpossess for free? You can play Jumpossess for free on Poki. Can I play Jumpossess on mobile devices and desktop? Jumpossess can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
